reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Dave for stopping by and traveling through history with us.
reviews_data.review_text: Just finished a great MecDec bus tour sponsored by Lost Worlds. Really appreciate their customer service and support. Will visit here more often.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Issa for your kind words. We hope to see you again soon.
reviews_data.review_text:
I’ve been to Lost Worlds Brewery twice so far for my Rotary Leadership Impact meetings, and every time I’m here, the vibe is on point. It’s a great place to chill, relax, and socialize—whether you’re with a group or just hanging out.

Their beer selection is solid. I don’t remember the one I had during my first visit, but this time I tried the Matawil Mexican Lager because I wanted something that tasted close to Modelo—and it delivered! Finished it off with a slice of lime, and it hit just right.

If beer isn’t your thing, no worries—they also serve margaritas, cocktails, and wine, so there’s something for everyone.

The staff is friendly, the environment is laid-back, and they’re pet-friendly, which adds to the relaxing vibe.

Parking isn’t too bad either. There’s a parking garage across the street—if it’s not too packed, avoid the hassle and just go ahead and park on the third or fourth floor. Super convenient!

If you’re in the area looking for a local brewery that’s versatile, social, and easygoing, Lost Worlds is definitely worth checking out.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Maria for stopping by. We hope to see you again soon.
reviews_data.review_text: Stopped by today for the first time and absolutely loved it. The equator was wonderful but the service was even better! Jessie and Katey were so fun to be around, I would come back just for them.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Sam for stopping by. We hope to see you again soon.
reviews_data.review_text: Excellent beer in a great setting, with the whole side of their building opening up over the greenway during nice weather.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Holly for stopping by and for your kind words. We appreciate you.
reviews_data.review_text: Very good atmosphere and friendly staff.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Jan for your kind words. Please come visit us again.
reviews_data.review_text: Relaxing atmosphere and very good service. Nice beer selection.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Chris for stopping by!
reviews_data.review_text: I came in during the slow time. Olivia was super nice and friendly. The beer was great too. Would highly recommend.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Bruce for stopping by. We appreciate you. That hefeweizen is a unique beer. Folks love it or express sentiments like yours. It has won us medals at the NC Brewers Cup twice - so we are hesitant to change it completely... but I'll pass your feedback to our brewers. Cheers!
reviews_data.review_text:
Early for the Yelp event around the corner and done with my workday, I stopped in to Lost Worlds for a wind down beverage. Lost Worlds is located in the Metropolitan shopping center at the front, opposite Wendy's and Target. The free parking deck near Best Buy is accessible and a short walk.

Lost Worlds is much bigger on the inside that it appears with a deep dining/drinking area and at least one room that can be set up for private meetings. I started there and moved to the bar after one such group arrived.

I enjoyed the space very much but the hefeweizen was not as tasty as some I have had. Not quite "watery" but not the cloves and banana notes I would like. They have a great selection of beers so I'll try something else next time.

Lots of different seating options including the bar, high tops, low tops, even some sofa chairs arranged in a small circle. Great spot to relax with a beer and they do have other drinks available.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for your kind words!
reviews_data.review_text: Great beer selection, nice outdoor area, even has an event room.  Friendly service.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Paige! It was great meeting you! I really appreciate the kind words.
reviews_data.review_text:
Stopped in today after getting lunch next door, and even though they weren't open yet (didnt open for another hour), Dave (owner) was happy to let us in to grab a couple drinks without a second thought. My fiance and I have been here twice now, and the environment is always relaxed and inviting. Dave was eager to talk with us, and we sampled some absolutely delicious beers!

Thank you, Dave, for a great experience! We'll be back with friends next time 🙂

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Jim for stopping by. We really appreciate the kind words!
reviews_data.review_text: Cool spot with a nice view of the greenway.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Larry for stopping by. We appreciate your kind words.
reviews_data.review_text: Very nice location. Right on the greenway. Parking is a little bit of a challenge, but well worth a visit. We went there with our daughter and three Greyhounds. We enjoyed their beers. There was a food truck that was quite convenient. Very comfortable and inviting.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Ed for stopping by. We appreciate your kind words. Cheers!
reviews_data.review_text: Excellent brewery with great variety.  The bartender was very knowledgeable and was very informative on each of their beers.  Highly recommended!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Melanie for your kind words. We will share your feedback with Emmet. Have a great weekend.
reviews_data.review_text: Love the concept and “open-ness” in our neighborhood. Emmett is awesome and runs the bar like a pro! Whether you want drinks or beer, this is the spot for any type of gathering. Definitely will be back!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Lauren or your kind words. We hope to see you again soon.
reviews_data.review_text: The rum punch is such a banger and the staff is all super cool!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Austen for stopping by! We appreciate your kind words.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for stopping by!

Really nice place great selection of beers and cocktails.
Recommend the Lavender Goldrush. Was like spiked lemonade on a hot day.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Alison for the kind words. We aim to deliver your experience every time. See you soon! Cheers!
reviews_data.review_text: Such a great location and brewery! I went and checked it out and trivia happened to be going on. That will definitely have us come back as we had such a fun night. The staff was also so great, especially the manager. He informed us of their beers and let us sample a couple before we chose.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Blake for stopping by. We appreciate the kind words.
reviews_data.review_text: I live a couple streets over from Lost Worlds and I was so excited to hear about them opening a location so close to me. It’s such an awesome location along the greenway, with a very nice patio. Emmet is my favorite bartender to hangout at the bar with. Always personable and fun to talk to!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Samantha for your kind words. We hope to see you again in the future!
reviews_data.review_text: Visiting family in Charlotte, on a Friday, and decided to stop in Lost Worlds Brewing. The place is spacious and a unique atmosphere. The bartender, Emmet, was kind enough to help me select a beverage. Since I can't drink alcohol, he was listing off types of mocktails he could make  for me. I was appreciative of his kindness and taking the time to walk me through options!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Marissa for stopping by. We hope to see you again soon!
reviews_data.review_text:
Refreshing experience at Lost Worlds Brewery. The guy with the Irish accent was cheerful and had great recommendations. Loved their cocktail menu.
This is a great addition to the Metropolitan area. Highly recommend if you're looking for great beer recommendations and friendly staff!

reviews_data.owner_answer: If for some reason your drink is not perfect, please tell the bartender immediately and have them remake it for you. I'm sorry you had to a bad experience.
reviews_data.review_text: Cool environment. Poor mixing from the Bartender. Drinks not good.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for the feedback. At this time, we only have a few more taproom artifacts to add to the location. From then on, many of artifacts come from our guests as they travel the world. So... short scoop - it is an ongoing process. Expect to see more as time passes and our guests make their contribution to our ever evolving taproom.
reviews_data.review_text: MecDec honey was awesome, love the concept of the new location, could use more themed decorations for atmosphere, but will be back.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you George for your kind words. They are very appreciated. We hope to see you again soon.
reviews_data.review_text: Awesome spot right off the greenway, Metropolitan needed a cool brewery to round it out. Solid beer, Trivia night is awesome and great restaurants near by, excited to have it in the neighborhood

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Jack for stopping by and for the recommendation. We're glad you enjoyed yourself. Please come again soon.
reviews_data.review_text: This place is fantastic, staff is friendly personable and amazing. I love the beers especially costa west coast IPA. The vibe is great my gf and I really enjoy the seating over looking the green way well playing some of the trivia games. Our doggos really enjoy the dog treats as well!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Kim for stopping by. We really appreciate your kind words and hope you come back again soon!
reviews_data.review_text: We stumbled upon Lost Worlds when in the area and love it! The location is perfect by the greenway with a view of uptown peeking through the trees. The bar tenders are super helpful and friendly! Highly recommend!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Mike for stopping by. We appreciate your kind words. You are correct, we do not have food, but we do have a partnership with Joan's to deliver food right to your table. Have a great Memorial Day Weekend!
reviews_data.review_text: We went on a quiet Sunday afternoon and sat at the bar. Leila let us sample beers.  I got the Mecdec Honey Ale and Jo got the Kolsch.   Excellent designed bar. Worth a visit. No food but they let you bring food in.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Jeff for the great review. We appreciate the visit and hope to see you again soon.
reviews_data.review_text: Love the new location and open air layout at the Metropolitan! I had a flight of 4 IPA's and all were good! Located on the Little Sugar Creek Greenway side near Charlottetown Ave across from Wendy's. Easy free parking in the Metros parking deck.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Kristen for your kind words. We hope to see you again soon!
reviews_data.review_text: Amazing brewery. The blue raspberry seltzer they make is out of this world. Bartender super friendly. Nice, open, comfortable space right on the greenway. Free parking too in the garage or street!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Chris for stopping by. We appreciate the kind words. We love our IPA's
reviews_data.review_text: Tight little spot, super open space with great hazy IPAs. Looking forward to coming back!

reviews_data.review_text: Lost Worlds brewery has got me "Lost" in thinking I could find a better brewery!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank  you so much Callie for the kind words! They are very appreciated - especially since we are the new kid on the block.
reviews_data.review_text: So excited that this opened near us! The space is large and welcoming, and the service is excellent. I also love the beers -- great variety, and an expansive wine and cocktail menu if you're not the beer drinking type. Go here!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Lisa for stopping by. We really appreciate the kind words and taking the time to give us a great review.
reviews_data.review_text: Terrific addition to Metropolitan area!  Friendly staff, good beers, and lots of fun events.  We enjoyed a wine tasting (held monthly; small fee to participate) and stayed for music bingo.  Will definitely come back!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Matthew for stopping by. Matawil is a great beer. Glad you enjoyed it.
reviews_data.review_text:
Christina and Casey were great, we love the Mexican beer. Also this sour was phenomenal!
Such a good location!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Janet for the kind words. We're putting out a good amount of marketing and will continue to do so. Thank you for the feedback.
reviews_data.review_text: Fantastic place.. probably would be busier if I knew about it rather than stumbling upon it in traffic

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Noah for stopping by! We hope to see you again soon.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for stopping by Xavier! We love you had a great experience.
reviews_data.review_text: Great beer and great taproom! Bartenders are super knowledgeable and the draft list is expansive enough that it’s hard to find something you won’t like.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for stopping by. Not sure what it means for Christine to put her foot in cocktails - but we're glad it was enjoyable.
reviews_data.review_text: The cocktails are amazing which is funny to say for a brewery but Christina puts her foot in her cocktails! I highly recommend!!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Andy for stopping by. We appreciate the kind words. Hope to see you again soon.
reviews_data.review_text: Fantastic place with lots of space, a beautiful view of the greenway, great beer and cocktails, and attentive and friendly service. Olivia, who poured my beers and mixed me a nice, tangy pisco sour, was absolutely excellent behind the bar. A welcome addition to the neighborhood!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Ken for your kind words. They are greatly appreciated.
reviews_data.review_text: Tried Lost Worlds recently based on a coworker's recommendation and loved it! The beer was great. My bartender Olivia was friendly and made great beer recommendations. Definitely will stop by again!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Brad for visiting. We appreciate the recommendation. Hope to see you again soon.
reviews_data.review_text: This was my first time here so wasn’t familiar with any of the beers. Olivia was very helpful with the recommendations and let us sample a few. Also, cool location beside of a greenway that I didn’t know was there. Will be back.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Laurie for your kind words. We hope you visit again soon.
reviews_data.review_text: What a wonderful experience today at Lost Worlds’ newest location. The view of Sugar Creek is breathtaking. Christine is a marvelous adventure guide — she was so attentive and friendly. You can always count on a great time at Lost World (in both locations)!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Brian for stopping by! We appreciate the kind words!
reviews_data.review_text: Perfect spot to enjoy a beer or cocktail! Atmosphere is great, backs up to the greenway which provides an amazing view.  Every beer I tried was great.  Service was great! Olivia did a great job as our bartender and was very knowledgeable! Definitely a 5 star experience!

reviews_data.review_text: Super cool spot! Love the theme and decor. The beers were top notch and Tommy was a fantastic bartender. Had a couple tasty brews and a great conversation before heading to the airport. Highly recommend!

reviews_data.review_text:
I’ve been to Lost Worlds Brewery twice so far for my Rotary Leadership Impact meetings, and every time I’m here, the vibe is on point. It’s a great place to chill, relax, and socialize—whether you’re with a group or just hanging out.

Their beer selection is solid. I don’t remember the one I had during my first visit, but this time I tried the Matawil Mexican Lager because I wanted something that tasted close to Modelo—and it delivered! Finished it off with a slice of lime, and it hit just right.

If beer isn’t your thing, no worries—they also serve margaritas, cocktails, and wine, so there’s something for everyone.

The staff is friendly, the environment is laid-back, and they’re pet-friendly, which adds to the relaxing vibe.

Parking isn’t too bad either. There’s a parking garage across the street—if it’s not too packed, avoid the hassle and just go ahead and park on the third or fourth floor. Super convenient!

If you’re in the area looking for a local brewery that’s versatile, social, and easygoing, Lost Worlds is definitely worth checking out.

reviews_data.owner_answer: If for some reason your drink is not perfect, please tell the bartender immediately and have them remake it for you. I'm sorry you had to a bad experience.
reviews_data.review_text: Cool environment. Poor mixing from the Bartender. Drinks not good.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for the feedback. At this time, we only have a few more taproom artifacts to add to the location. From then on, many of artifacts come from our guests as they travel the world. So... short scoop - it is an ongoing process. Expect to see more as time passes and our guests make their contribution to our ever evolving taproom.
reviews_data.review_text: MecDec honey was awesome, love the concept of the new location, could use more themed decorations for atmosphere, but will be back.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you George for your kind words. They are very appreciated. We hope to see you again soon.
reviews_data.review_text: Awesome spot right off the greenway, Metropolitan needed a cool brewery to round it out. Solid beer, Trivia night is awesome and great restaurants near by, excited to have it in the neighborhood

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Jack for stopping by and for the recommendation. We're glad you enjoyed yourself. Please come again soon.
reviews_data.review_text: This place is fantastic, staff is friendly personable and amazing. I love the beers especially costa west coast IPA. The vibe is great my gf and I really enjoy the seating over looking the green way well playing some of the trivia games. Our doggos really enjoy the dog treats as well!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Kim for stopping by. We really appreciate your kind words and hope you come back again soon!
reviews_data.review_text: We stumbled upon Lost Worlds when in the area and love it! The location is perfect by the greenway with a view of uptown peeking through the trees. The bar tenders are super helpful and friendly! Highly recommend!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Mike for stopping by. We appreciate your kind words. You are correct, we do not have food, but we do have a partnership with Joan's to deliver food right to your table. Have a great Memorial Day Weekend!
reviews_data.review_text: We went on a quiet Sunday afternoon and sat at the bar. Leila let us sample beers.  I got the Mecdec Honey Ale and Jo got the Kolsch.   Excellent designed bar. Worth a visit. No food but they let you bring food in.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Jeff for the great review. We appreciate the visit and hope to see you again soon.
reviews_data.review_text: Love the new location and open air layout at the Metropolitan! I had a flight of 4 IPA's and all were good! Located on the Little Sugar Creek Greenway side near Charlottetown Ave across from Wendy's. Easy free parking in the Metros parking deck.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Kristen for your kind words. We hope to see you again soon!
reviews_data.review_text: Amazing brewery. The blue raspberry seltzer they make is out of this world. Bartender super friendly. Nice, open, comfortable space right on the greenway. Free parking too in the garage or street!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Chris for stopping by. We appreciate the kind words. We love our IPA's
reviews_data.review_text: Tight little spot, super open space with great hazy IPAs. Looking forward to coming back!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Matthew for stopping by. We really appreciate the kind words!
reviews_data.review_text: I tried the MecDec honey ale and it is fantastic

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for stopping by. We appreciate you!
reviews_data.review_text: Good beers, views, and conversations at this brewery!  All the staff are incredibly amazing including Christine, Emmitt, Charlea, and gang!!  Highly recommend check em out!  Next to the Greenway and Metropolitan shopping center.  Super friendly to pets too!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for your kind words. They are very appreciated.
reviews_data.review_text:
Агонь!
Пиво супер. Выбор колоссальный!
Столиков очень много , напротив речушка.
Кафешка дружественна к  собакам 🐕🐕‍🦺🦮🐩🐾🐶

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for stopping by. We much prefer five star reviews - please let us know what we can do to make it a five star experience next time.
reviews_data.review_text: Great location, very ample outside covered from rain. View of the greenway is nice. Plenty of good beer.  And food places close by.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Matthew for the kind words... and the clever word play. We appreciate you.
reviews_data.review_text: Lost Worlds brewery has got me "Lost" in thinking I could find a better brewery!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank  you so much Callie for the kind words! They are very appreciated - especially since we are the new kid on the block.
reviews_data.review_text: So excited that this opened near us! The space is large and welcoming, and the service is excellent. I also love the beers -- great variety, and an expansive wine and cocktail menu if you're not the beer drinking type. Go here!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Lisa for stopping by. We really appreciate the kind words and taking the time to give us a great review.
reviews_data.review_text: Terrific addition to Metropolitan area!  Friendly staff, good beers, and lots of fun events.  We enjoyed a wine tasting (held monthly; small fee to participate) and stayed for music bingo.  Will definitely come back!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Matthew for stopping by. Matawil is a great beer. Glad you enjoyed it.
reviews_data.review_text:
Christina and Casey were great, we love the Mexican beer. Also this sour was phenomenal!
Such a good location!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Janet for the kind words. We're putting out a good amount of marketing and will continue to do so. Thank you for the feedback.
reviews_data.review_text: Fantastic place.. probably would be busier if I knew about it rather than stumbling upon it in traffic

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Noah for stopping by! We hope to see you again soon.
reviews_data.review_text: Great vibes. Friendly and knowledgeable staff. Look forward to coming back

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for stopping by Xavier! We love you had a great experience.
reviews_data.review_text: Great beer and great taproom! Bartenders are super knowledgeable and the draft list is expansive enough that it’s hard to find something you won’t like.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for stopping by. Not sure what it means for Christine to put her foot in cocktails - but we're glad it was enjoyable.
reviews_data.review_text: The cocktails are amazing which is funny to say for a brewery but Christina puts her foot in her cocktails! I highly recommend!!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Andy for stopping by. We appreciate the kind words. Hope to see you again soon.
reviews_data.review_text: Fantastic place with lots of space, a beautiful view of the greenway, great beer and cocktails, and attentive and friendly service. Olivia, who poured my beers and mixed me a nice, tangy pisco sour, was absolutely excellent behind the bar. A welcome addition to the neighborhood!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Ken for your kind words. They are greatly appreciated.
reviews_data.review_text: Tried Lost Worlds recently based on a coworker's recommendation and loved it! The beer was great. My bartender Olivia was friendly and made great beer recommendations. Definitely will stop by again!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Brad for visiting. We appreciate the recommendation. Hope to see you again soon.
reviews_data.review_text: This was my first time here so wasn’t familiar with any of the beers. Olivia was very helpful with the recommendations and let us sample a few. Also, cool location beside of a greenway that I didn’t know was there. Will be back.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Laurie for your kind words. We hope you visit again soon.
reviews_data.review_text: What a wonderful experience today at Lost Worlds’ newest location. The view of Sugar Creek is breathtaking. Christine is a marvelous adventure guide — she was so attentive and friendly. You can always count on a great time at Lost World (in both locations)!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Brian for stopping by! We appreciate the kind words!
reviews_data.review_text: Perfect spot to enjoy a beer or cocktail! Atmosphere is great, backs up to the greenway which provides an amazing view.  Every beer I tried was great.  Service was great! Olivia did a great job as our bartender and was very knowledgeable! Definitely a 5 star experience!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Max for stopping by! We hope to see you again in the near future.
reviews_data.review_text: Super cool spot! Love the theme and decor. The beers were top notch and Tommy was a fantastic bartender. Had a couple tasty brews and a great conversation before heading to the airport. Highly recommend!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for stopping by. We appreciate the kind words.
reviews_data.review_text: Great place to gather with a great urban feel. Nice beer selection, wine and even cocktails. Also nice place to meet neighbors if you are a MET resident
